description: Set up real Next.js 14 App Router frontend for the top 3 apps (quantchat, quantmail, quantai). Each gets app/ directory with layout.tsx, page.tsx, real routing, proper next.config.js, tailwind.config.ts, and loading/error states. The frontends import from @quant/shared-ui and display real pages with the design system.
steps: 1. Update apps/quantchat/package.json: add next@14, react@18, react-dom@18, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer as dependencies. Add scripts: dev (next dev), build (next build), start (next start). Keep existing backend scripts prefixed with backend:.
2. Create apps/quantchat/next.config.js with transpilePackages for @quant/* workspace packages, output: standalone.
3. Create apps/quantchat/tailwind.config.ts with content paths for app/ and packages/shared-ui, extend theme with Quant colors.
4. Create apps/quantchat/postcss.config.js with tailwindcss and autoprefixer plugins.
5. Create apps/quantchat/app/layout.tsx - Root layout with html, body, font, metadata (title: QuantChat, description). Import global CSS with Tailwind directives.
6. Create apps/quantchat/app/globals.css - Tailwind base/components/utilities directives plus CSS variable tokens from design system.
7. Create apps/quantchat/app/page.tsx - Main chat list page using AppShell, TopBar, BottomNav, ChatList from @quant/shared-ui. Show conversation list UI.
8. Create apps/quantchat/app/chat/[id]/page.tsx - Individual chat view using ChatBubble, ChatInput, TypingIndicator from @quant/shared-ui.
9. Create apps/quantchat/app/loading.tsx - Loading skeleton using Skeleton component.
10. Create apps/quantchat/app/error.tsx - Error boundary with retry button.
11. Repeat steps 1-6 for apps/quantmail: next.config.js, tailwind.config.ts, postcss.config.js, app/layout.tsx, app/globals.css, app/page.tsx (inbox view with FeedCard-style email list).
12. Create apps/quantmail/app/page.tsx - Inbox page with email list, search, folders sidebar using AppShell + Sidebar + SearchInput.
13. Create apps/quantmail/app/compose/page.tsx - Email compose page with TextArea, FormField, Button from shared-ui.
15. Repeat steps 1-6 for apps/quantai: next.config.js, tailwind.config.ts, postcss.config.js, app/layout.tsx, app/globals.css.
16. Create apps/quantai/app/page.tsx - AI chat interface using AIChat component from shared-ui, with model selector and conversation sidebar.
17. Create apps/quantai/app/voice/page.tsx - Voice interaction page with VoiceInput component.
19. Create apps/quantchat/tsconfig.json (Next.js style extending root), apps/quantmail/tsconfig.json, apps/quantai/tsconfig.json for Next.js compatibility.
acceptance_criteria: Each app has app/layout.tsx, app/page.tsx, next.config.js, tailwind.config.ts
All three apps typecheck cleanly with their respective tsconfig.json
Imports from @quant/shared-ui resolve correctly in all app files
Each app has proper HTML metadata (title, description)
Loading and error states are present for each app
